reviews.text: We couldn’t be happier with our choice of Tina as our photographer. Our wedding was on December 22, 2025, and she was incredible from start to finish. She was amazing at guiding us through poses and made everything feel natural. Every single photo turned out beautiful. She captured all the big moments and little details perfectly, and we received our full gallery within a month. Looking through our photos feels like reliving the day all over again. We are so grateful and highly recommend her!

Choosing Tina Joiner for my wedding photos was hands down one of the best decisions we made for our wedding — truly.

It took me months to find and decide on a photographer because it was the #1 most important thing I wanted to invest in for our wedding — even more than my dress, the venue, or anything else. I love photos and everything they represent — the memories they hold, being able to relive moments forever, and sharing them with loved ones for years to come. I needed our pictures to be perfect. Choosing Tina was the best decision I could have made. Also, super transparent and straightforward pricing + packages, which made it easy to choose what I wanted and needed.

From the moment we did our engagement session with her, we knew we were in the best hands. Our engagement photos were STUNNING. I loved them so much that I couldn’t even wait for the wedding photos — I had one of the engagement pictures blown up onto a canvas because it was that beautiful.

On our wedding day, Tina and Summer, her lovely assistant photographer, were such a dream team. Summer did an incredible job capturing additional angles, candid moments, and beautiful details that made our gallery feel so full and complete. They worked seamlessly together, and you could truly feel how experienced and in-sync they are.

One thing I especially loved is that Tina told us exactly what to do and how to pose — both for our engagement session and on our wedding day. Posing does not come naturally to us at all, and she guided us so clearly and confidently. She made it feel effortless and natural, and somehow every single pose turned out perfectly. We never felt awkward because she was so good at directing us.

On the wedding day, there were a few general hiccups (as there always are with weddings) that were completely unrelated to her — just normal timeline things and small behind-the-scenes stuff. Through all of it, Tina kept us calmer than anyone else — honestly even more than the planner, the day-of coordinator, and even the venue’s coordinator. She has the most grounding, steady presence. She anticipated needs, stepped in when things needed direction, and kept everything flowing seamlessly. She truly could have been my day-of coordinator with how much she did for us.

There was one moment I will literally never forget. I was swapping out of my heels and into my Converse, we were running a little behind, and I was stressed trying to change my shoes quickly. She looked at me so calmly and said, “No one knows you’re running behind except you.” Instantly, I felt peace. It completely reset my mindset. That simple sentence is something I will carry with me forever.

Beyond keeping us calm and guiding us through every pose, they captured everything so beautifully — the big emotional moments and the quiet in-between ones we didn’t even realize were happening. Looking through our photos feels like reliving the entire day. Every image is timeless, natural, and full of genuine emotion. The photo where she pulled part of my veil in front of us — are you kidding me?! SO stunning (attached to my review).

Tina and Summer were organized, professional, communicative, calming, and truly invested in us from start to finish. These are photos we will cherish for the rest of our lives.

If you’re looking for a photographer who is incredibly talented, directive in the best way, calming under pressure, and genuinely shows up for you on your wedding day, Tina is it. I am beyond grateful we chose her. Brides and grooms, you will not regret choosing her to be your photographer on your special day.

Thank you Tina and Summer for my flawless wedding photos that I will cherish forever. 🩵

I just want to give a huge thank you to Summer. She was amazing. She was so helpful on our wedding day and did so much more than she needed to. She traveled a bit with us to take off-site mountain photos, did what she could to get the best lighting in all of our photos, and she even helped our wedding coordinator bustle my dress. The preview photos we received were absolutely beautiful. If you want a great photographer I would definitely book through Tina Joiner and have Summer take your photos.

Summer did an AMAZING job on our engagement and wedding photos. She is a delight to work with and is so friendly and fun! We had a blast working with her and Amanda for our wedding. They helped with other aspects of the wedding and were extremely knowledgeable and calming during stressful times. I highly recommend Tina Joiner Photography and her team for all your photography needs!

Simply the best. Tina is the kindest, sweetest, most thoughtful and organized photographer we have ever hired. She is an accomplished photographer. Her photos are incredible; they make you gasp at their beauty.

The true test of a small business owner comes when something doesn’t go quite right. Well, I can tell you that Tina handled herself professionally and with expedience in remedying the hiccup. While the mistake was on our part, she felt horrible anyway. Her solution was quick and a perfectly acceptable alternative. Seriously impressed.

Tina and her team are the best photographers you could hire to capture the moments of your wedding. She gets all the group shots, the memorabilia pictures and is especially good at capturing the candid moments. Thank you for the brilliant pictures of our daughter’s wedding! It will be a day we will remember forever in the perfect pictures you took.
